summary: Displays UI to the user. Watches one or more Riverpod providers to read reactive data, dispatches user actions back to providers, and composes reusable widgets. Defines: AddGoalScreen, _AddGoalScreenState.
Pure computation class. Takes data as input parameters and returns computed values. Contains no side effects, database access, or UI concerns. Defines: GoalCalculator.

Riverpod state management unit. Exposes reactive data or async results to the UI layer. Typically reads from a DAO or another provider and transforms the data. Defines: GoalProgress. Providers: goalsProvider.

Displays UI to the user. Watches one or more Riverpod providers to read reactive data, dispatches user actions back to providers, and composes reusable widgets. Defines: GoalsScreen, _EmptyState, _GoalCard.
